_comment: TODO: Build this workflow in ComfyUI UI and export here.
_description: 8-direction agent sprite generation: SDXL + Pixel Art XL LoRA + IPAdapter (reference character image). Generate 8 variants with directional prompts (north, northeast, east, etc.). IPAdapter strength 0.6-0.8.

_prompt_template.positive: pixelart, pixel art, {character_description}, {direction} facing view, centered, no background, game sprite, top-down RPG character
_prompt_template.negative: blurry, realistic, 3d render, photo, text, watermark, frame
